rules.rule: Contributions must be made from a fork — never push feature branches to upstream.
Branch names must follow users/{handle}/{type}/{short-description} in lowercase kebab-case.
Commit messages must be imperative mood with ALL CAPS category prefix.
Commit messages must not be vague — fix, update, changes, wip are forbidden without specifics.
Each pull request must be focused on a single concern.
A PR must have a passing build and all tests green before review.
Secrets and connection strings must never be committed to source control.
CI pipelines must use ADotNet or equivalent YAML-based configuration.
